canonical_definition: Simulation suite and benchmark for open-ended embodied agents in Minecraft, featuring thousands of natural language-specified tasks across navigation, harvesting, combat, and crafting.
papers: FOUNDER: Grounding Foundation Models in World Models for Open-Ended Embodied Decision Making
LARM: Large Auto-Regressive Model for Long-Horizon Embodied Intelligence

relationships.paper: LARM: Large Auto-Regressive Model for Long-Horizon Embodied Intelligence
relationships.evidence: "The behaviors that can be conducted in MineDojo primarily include navigation, harvest, combat, and craft."

icml25: LARM: Large Auto-Regressive Model for Long-Horizon Embodied Intelligence

relationships.paper: LARM: Large Auto-Regressive Model for Long-Horizon Embodied Intelligence
relationships.evidence: We validate our method in both MineDojo (Fan et al., 2022) and Mineflayer (PrismarineJS., 2013) environments. The experimental results suggest that our method completes diverse challenging tasks with a single model, indicating its promising generalization. (Section 1)

icml25: LARM: Large Auto-Regressive Model for Long-Horizon Embodied Intelligence
